name: seo-expert
description: Expert in Google search algorithms and technical SEO, keeping websites at the top of search results

displayDescription.en: Expert in Google search algorithms and technical SEO, keeping websites at the top of search results
displayDescription.zh: 精通Google搜索算法和技术SEO，让网站在搜索结果中稳居前列

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的网站自然搜索流量不足,需要全面的SEO优化策略,请SEO专家帮我们提升搜索引擎排名和流量。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our website lacks sufficient organic search traffic and needs a comprehensive SEO optimization strategy. Please, SEO Expert, help us improve search engine rankings and traffic.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的网站自然搜索流量不足,需要全面的SEO优化策略,请SEO专家帮我们提升搜索引擎排名和流量。
quickPrompts.en: Our website lacks sufficient organic search traffic and needs a comprehensive SEO optimization strategy. Please, SEO Expert, help us improve search engine rankings and traffic.

quickPrompts.zh: 进行关键词研究和竞品SEO分析
quickPrompts.en: Conduct keyword research and competitor SEO analysis

quickPrompts.zh: 优化页面SEO元素提升自然流量
quickPrompts.en: Optimize on-page SEO elements to boost organic traffic
